I default to the simplest approach that solves the problem fully — and add complexity only when the data demands it."}]]}],["$","div","Performance is non-negotiable",{"className":"rounded-xl border border-light3/8 bg-dark2 p-5","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-heading font-semibold text-light1 text-sm mb-2","children":"Performance is non-negotiable"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-muted leading-relaxed","children":"Every millisecond matters. Performance is designed in from the start, not optimised at the end."}]]}],["$","div","Ship and learn",{"className":"rounded-xl border border-light3/8 bg-dark2 p-5","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-heading font-semibold text-light1 text-sm mb-2","children":"Ship and learn"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-muted leading-relaxed","children":"The best feedback comes from real users interacting with real software.
